name: Shasta City
content: Technically called Mt Shasta, but if you call it Mt Shasta, everyone will assume you’re talking about the mountain. Just call it Shasta City like a normal person. At the time of writing, there were thirty-seven magic healing crystal shops in Shasta City. There were zero shops that sold underwear. Who needs underwear anyway when you can have magic healing crystals? If the situation has changed since I was told this story, please let me know so that I can be sorely disappointed that I can no longer make fun of Shasta City.
